title: Ireland, Seen as a Weak Link in Europe’s Defense, Is Trying to Bulk Up
summary_full: As concern rises in Europe over threats from an emboldened Russia, the Irish government says it’s working to plug gaps in its military, which reflect a tradition of neutrality.
summary_public: As concern rises in Europe over threats from an emboldened Russia, the Irish government says it’s working to plug gaps in its military, which reflect a tradition of neutrality.
